description: Default context recipe for AIWizard macOS-app generation. Loads in priority order: framework scaffold > active memory > universal wisdom > framework-specific wisdom > frontend-skill guidance > feature manifest > user goal > recent history. Each layer skips cleanly when its prerequisite isn't available. v2 added active-memory layer (Phase MA.3). v3 adds excludeTitlePatterns to drop CCAA / AgentRuntime / ScheduledJob log spam from retrieval results — the FTS5 index includes 9000+ historical agent log entries that are noise for context injection. v4 (2026-04-20): Phase DF — added frontend-skill-guidance layer at priority 82. For macOS apps, the frontend-skill pack contributes the subset of rules that transfer (fs-003 no-cards-by-default, fs-007 copy discipline, fs-011 premium-without-decoration, fs-012 orientation/status/action for product UIs). Rules scoped miniapp-only / webspa-only are ignored by the LLM via the `appliesTo` field.
